projectDescription: An autonomous AI agent that decomposes research questions, searches the web via DuckDuckGo, fetches and scores pages for credibility, and synthesizes cited markdown reports — accessible via CLI or a React web UI.
keyFeatures: Multi-step research pipeline: planning → first-round search → gap detection → second-round search → synthesis
Powered by Google Gemini (gemini-2.0-flash) with automatic model fallbacks and retry logic
DuckDuckGo web search via ddgs with up to 5 results per query
Source credibility scoring (0.0–1.0) based on domain authority, recency signals, and snippet relevance
Structured markdown reports with Executive Summary, Key Findings, Confidence Assessment, and numbered citations
Real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) progress stream: search, fetch, thinking, gaps, plan, done
FastAPI backend with streaming and batch research endpoints
React + TypeScript web UI with live activity log and GFM markdown rendering
CLI entry point for scripting and terminal workflows
Page content capped at 3000 characters; max 10 agent loop iterations
publicApiSurface: AgentRunner.run_tool_use_loop(context, system_instruction, prompt, on_progress, max_iterations) -> str
generate_content_with_retry(client, contents, config, on_progress, active_model) -> tuple[response, str]
